license_or_terms: Custom terms published by Egaroucid: free use for own Othello AI activities; raw data redistribution is prohibited.
required_attribution: Attribution is requested but not required by the published terms; cite Egaroucid training data and https://www.egaroucid.nyanyan.dev/ja/technology/train-data/ when used.

label_generation_by_occupied_range.procedure: Enumerate every progression through move 11, evaluate each progression with Egaroucid, and negamax the results.
Use the terminal score from self-play after a randomized opening length with 7 <= N <= 59.

notes: Manifest-only local corpus reference. The source terms explicitly allow using the data to create an Othello evaluation function, so local derived-weight training is allowed; redistribution remains prohibited and commercial use remains unknown. Keep the raw zip under the external local corpus directory and generated TSVs, reports, datasets, and weights under the separate external training directory.
